task_completion.description: Verify the employee/host field label has been changed to 'Escort'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jolly Lobby Track visitor registration interface, the label next to the employee/host selection dropdown or text field should read 'Escort'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Eli Vance' is available and selected as the Escort.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Eli Vance' should be visible and selected within the newly labeled 'Escort' field on the registration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the visitor name is entered as 'Viktor Antonov'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visitor name field in the registration form should contain the text 'Viktor Antonov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the company name is entered as 'City 17 Logistics'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The company field in the registration form should contain the text 'City 17 Logistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot of the application window was captured showing the updated label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final evaluated image should be a screenshot of the Jolly Lobby Track application window clearly displaying the customized 'Escort' label and the entered visitor details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jolly Lobby Track application interface being interacted with (e.g., settings menus, registration forms), rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot is of the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot must show the genuine Jolly Lobby Track window with standard UI elements, not a mocked-up image, a cropped text snippet, or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the required information into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The names 'Viktor Antonov', 'Eli Vance', and 'City 17 Logistics' must appear in the correct input fields of the Jolly Lobby Track application, not in a generic text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected field label for the host/employee is 'Escort'. The visitor being registered must be named 'Viktor Antonov' from the company 'City 17 Logistics'. The assigned escort (host) must be 'Eli Vance'. The final screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/escort_label_verification.png'.
